column8: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Concrete with Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite. (FILL)
Sub-angular Boulders, Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown, silty SAND and some red bricks. (FILL)
Sub-rounded Boulder, Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown silty SAND.
Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some brown silty SAND.

Moderately strong to strong, greyish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained, kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-50 degrees, 65 degrees-75 degrees and occasionally vertical joints.
